title: Haplopappus cerberoanus
taxonomy: Haplopappus cerberoanus is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is native to South America, specifically in the Andes mountains. The classification of Haplopappus cerberoanus is as follows: it belongs to the genus Haplopappus, family Asteraceae, and order Asterales. Within the family Asteraceae, Haplopappus cerberoanus is part of the subfamily Mutisioideae. The subfamily Mutisioideae is a group of plants that are closely related to the genus Mutisia.
